scripts.test:coaching-package: npm --workspace backend run test:coaching-package:e2e && npm --workspace frontend run test:cards
scripts.test:personalization: npm --workspace backend run test:agent-policy && npm --workspace backend run test:memory && npm --workspace backend run test:outcome && npm --workspace backend run test:strategy
scripts.test:workspace: npm --workspace backend run test:work-items && npm --workspace backend run test:coaching-quality && npm --workspace backend run test:coaching-revision && npm --workspace backend run test:product-events && npm --workspace frontend run test:cards
scripts.test:agent: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path .\agent\.venv\Scripts\python.exe) { .\agent\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m unittest discover agent\tests } else { python -m unittest discover agent\tests }"
scripts.test:agent-quality: npm run test:agent && npm --workspace backend run test:agent-quality && npm --workspace frontend run test:agent-ux
scripts.test:hygiene: npm --workspace backend run test:hygiene && npm --workspace frontend run test:cards
